tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

| [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch] | x2


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
  I know you got all dressed up for the club[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
  Waiting on a nigga come pick you up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Baby, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, when I saw ya walking out the door[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]  N.C.
ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, I just knew ya needed something more[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Now whip it straight back to the crib, ay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
  Finna give you something that you won't forget, no[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Baby, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, I just wanna get you out them clothes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]      N.C.
ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, I just wanna see you dance in[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Slow motion[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
We can take, we can take, we can take our time, baby[/tab]

In slow motion[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]

In slow motion[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
  So shawty, let your hair down and take a sip[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
  Gon' put this joint between your lips[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
Baby, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, why don't you make yourself comfortable?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]        N.C.
ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, while I go and put this tongue on you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
  So tell me when you ready,  I'ma speed it up for you just for a second[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
(for a second) just for a second, (for a second)[/tab]
N.C.
then I'ma slow it back down and keep it steady
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
ooh-ooh, ooh-oo baby, now that you are out them clothes[/tab]
